title: [Deprecated] Trinkets Compat Layer for Accessories
description: A Compatibility layer for mods using the Trinkets API to work with Accessories
body:
# Deprecation Notice

For versions **1.21.1 and up**, this is being replaced with the new [**Accessories Compat Layer**](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-compat-layer), with exactly the same function besides **needing to install** Curios alongside the new mod! 

# Accessories Trinkets Compatibility Layer

Such mod acts as a compatibility layer for mods using the [Trinkets API](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) to work within the [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/project/accessories) Ecosystem.

**DO NOT INSTALL TRINKETS, THIS ACTS AS IF TRINKETS AS ITS A WRAPPER FOR ITS API.**

Any existing Trinkets data should be transferred into accessory inventory or ejected within the inventory if a problem occurs. 

## Sinytra Connector: 
Support was made with such in mind meaning that the fabric version is not required to be installed when using sinytra so supplying **just the neoforge** version of Accessories is fine.
